heirloom-modules.title: Heirloom Modules
heirloom-modules.subtitle: A study in versatility and heritage.
heirloom-modules.intro: We believe that true heritage is not meant to sit in a vault. The Heirloom Modules collection is designed for the modern woman who wants to carry the weight of tradition with effortless, contemporary grace.
heirloom-modules.section1_text: Every piece begins with an understanding of historical Indian arch silhouettes. By stripping away the heavy ornamentation of the past, we allow the purity of the Kundan stones and the warmth of the temple gold to take center stage.
heirloom-modules.section2_text: Our master Kaarigars spend weeks ensuring that every modular joint moves fluidly. A heavy bridal collar transforms seamlessly into a delicate evening choker.
heirloom-modules.section3_text: Whether worn as a singular statement or layered for ceremonial grandeur, these pieces adapt to your life. They are designed to be passed down and reimagined for generations to come.

seasons-in-bloom.title: Seasons in Bloom
seasons-in-bloom.subtitle: Contemporary florals — light, colour, and fine detail.
seasons-in-bloom.intro: Nature never repeats herself, and neither do our Kaarigars. Seasons in Bloom captures the transient beauty of floral motifs using vibrant Meenakari and delicate stone settings.
seasons-in-bloom.section1_text: Moving away from heavy traditional gold, this collection embraces pastel enameling to create pieces that feel fresh, breathable, and distinctly modern.
seasons-in-bloom.section2_text: Each petal and leaf is mathematically proportioned so the jewellery sits perfectly against the skin, ensuring comfort alongside striking visual appeal.
seasons-in-bloom.section3_text: Designed for the celebrations of today. These pieces transition flawlessly from daytime mehendis to evening receptions.

aradhana.title: Aradhana
aradhana.subtitle: Temple-inspired silhouettes crafted for devotion and ceremony.
aradhana.intro: Rooted in the divine, Aradhana pays homage to the ancient temple jewellery of southern India, reimagined through the Fire & Ice contemporary lens.
aradhana.section1_text: We honor the traditional motifs of gods and celestial geometry, but scale them for modern wearability without losing their majestic aura.
aradhana.section2_text: Using a proprietary warm gold matte finish, we give these new creations the soulful, timeless glow of an heirloom that has been cherished for a hundred years.
aradhana.section3_text: These are our most substantial pieces, intended for the most significant days of your life. They carry physical and emotional weight, anchoring you in your heritage.
